## What

Updates two tests in `tests/api/jobs-route-input-contract.test.ts` to match the async worker kickoff contract introduced in the prior merge.

## Why

`POST /api/jobs` now returns **201 immediately** after creating the job. The worker kickoff runs in the background and logs failures — it no longer blocks the response or terminally fails the job at the API layer.

The two old tests expected `503 + WORKER_KICKOFF_FAILED` when the worker rejected. Those assertions are now wrong and were causing CI failures.

## Changes

- `tests/api/jobs-route-input-contract.test.ts` only — **1 file, 0 production code changed**
  - `"fails closed and terminalizes when worker kickoff fetch rejects"` → `"returns 201 and logs async when worker kickoff fetch rejects"`
  - `"fails closed and terminalizes when worker kickoff responds with ok false"` → `"returns 201 and logs async when worker kickoff responds with ok false"`
  - Both now assert `status 201`, `ok: true`, `job_id` present, and `failEvaluationJobTerminally` **not** called

## Verification

All 13 tests in `tests/api/jobs-route-input-contract.test.ts` pass on this branch against `main`.
